case_title: MARIA T. CANOY VS. VIVIANE C. VIEIRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,591.56 FILED BY CANOY, MARIA T. AS TO DEFENDANT VIEIRA, VIVIANE C. DOS SANTOS, BERNARDO STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-12-2019 AT 8:30 AM. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARIA T. CANOY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS: VIVIANE C. VIEIRA AND BERNARDO DOS SANTOS WITH PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER, ROBERTO DELIMA (#100901). APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S REPRESENTATIVE, BENITA SELOR. DEFENDANT VIVIANE C. VIEIRA WAIVES TIME ON SERVICE OF PROCESS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II,, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF CANOY, MARIA T.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-12-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIA T CANOY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VIVIANE C. VIEIRA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BERNARDO DOS SANTOS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATE FARM IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BERNARDO DOS DANTOS AND VIVIANE C. VIEIRA NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAR-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOS SANTOS, BERNARDO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANOY, MARIA T. AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 SERVED MAR-24-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VIEIRA, VIVIANE C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANOY, MARIA T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIEIRA, VIVIANE C. DOS SANTOS, BERNARDO $2,591.56 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,656.56, DEFENDANTS VIVIANE C. VIEIRA AND BERNARDO DOS SANTOS ARE LIABLE TO PLAINTIFF MARIA T. CONROY JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY FOR $2,591.56. STATE FARM INSURANCE COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
